## LinkedIn (Long-form)

### Announcement Post

**Guiding families through healthcare access and benefits**

I'm excited to share Access To Health — a free, open-source AI tool for healthcare navigators, social workers, and benefits counselors.

Here's the problem: Healthcare navigation, benefits enrollment, Medicaid/Medicare. But navigating this space is complex, and most people don't have a specialist by their side.

Access To Health changes that. It's a Claude Skill — upload one file to Claude, and it becomes your health expert. No code, no cost.

What you can do:
1. Determine Medicaid eligibility and walk through the application process
2. Compare Medicare Advantage plans for a client's specific needs
3. Navigate CHIP enrollment for children in a mixed-status family

It's part of the Access To ecosystem — 6 pillars, 7 projects, all open source.

Try it: github.com/dougdevitre/access-to-health
Learn more: https://dougdevitre.org

#AccessTo #CivicTech #AI #OpenSource #Health
